overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval rural village. The character crosses wooden bridges and dirt paths, passes thatched-roof huts and a large stone castle, and ends at a festival area with colorful banners and gathered villagers.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing river at village edge

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily across a wooden bridge leaving the village center, swords visible on his back

notable_agents.action: villager in brown dress walking toward Geralt on the bridge

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank bridge with railings crossing over river
flowing river with visible current and reflections
large wooden building with thatched roof at bridge entrance
simple wooden post and beam railing along bridge edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks across a wooden bridge leaving the village, with a river flowing to the right and wooden buildings visible on the left. A villager approaches from the opposite direction on the narrow bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path through village outskirts with wooden huts

events.description: steps off wooden bridge onto dirt path, leaving the bridge behind

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the dirt path past wooden huts and villagers, approaching the castle

notable_agents.action: villager in brown cloak walking ahead on the path toward the castle

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail with patches of grass
traditional log cabin with steep thatched roof and decorative trim
massive medieval stone fortification with crenellations becoming visible in distance
rustic wooden post fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge, Geralt walks along a dirt path where a thatched cottage stands prominently on the right. The stone walls of a large castle become visible in the distance ahead, while the river recedes to the far right.

events.description: path opens to waterfront with castle walls now dominating the right side
path curves slightly left following the contour of the castle walls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the castle waterfront, passing wooden docks and boats

entered.detail: cylindrical stone towers with conical red roofs rising above the walls
planked wooden walkway extending over the water
arched stone bridge crossing the waterway in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a waterfront path with massive castle walls towering on the right. Geralt walks past wooden docks extending into the water, with cylindrical towers and a distant stone bridge visible. The path curves gently following the castle's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: village festival grounds with colorful banners

events.description: leaves waterfront castle path and re-enters wooded village area
approaches festival area with red and yellow banners hanging overhead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the village outskirts toward a festival gathering with people seated at tables

notable_agents.action: villager standing near hut entrance watching the festivities

entered.detail: tall pine trees surrounding the village clearing
wooden hut with thatched roof and open doorway
red and yellow vertical flags strung between wooden poles
rough wooden picnic tables with villagers seated around them
large red canvas tent with open sides

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the castle waterfront and enters a wooded village area with dense trees. He approaches a festival grounds decorated with colorful red and yellow banners hanging overhead. Villagers sit at wooden tables near a large red tent, while wooden huts line the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quiet village outskirts into the imposing presence of a castle and finally into a festive community gathering. It begins with Geralt crossing a narrow wooden bridge over a flowing river, passing a villager as wooden buildings line the left bank. As he leaves the bridge, the path shifts to a dirt road past a thatched cottage, while the river recedes and the massive stone walls of a castle emerge in the distance. The scene then opens onto a waterfront path where the camera tracks alongside towering castle walls and wooden docks before curving toward a wooded area. Finally, the environment transforms into a vibrant festival ground, moving under colorful red and yellow banners toward villagers gathered at wooden tables near a large red tent.
